allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Ali\\.claude\\projects\\d--Truehold\\fe9fd6bb-2c13-4d24-ae69-78fbab5e12a6\\tool-results\\webfetch-1779453014337-r52gd7.bin"; $dest = "C:\\Users\\Ali\\.claude\\projects\\d--Truehold\\design-truehold"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($src\); Write-Output \("First bytes: " + \($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\)\); Write-Output \("Total size: " + $bytes.Length\))

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Ali\\.claude\\projects\\d--Truehold\\fe9fd6bb-2c13-4d24-ae69-78fbab5e12a6\\tool-results\\webfetch-1779453014337-r52gd7.bin"; $dest = "C:\\Users\\Ali\\.claude\\projects\\d--Truehold\\design-truehold"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; $tarPath = Join-Path $dest "design.tar"; $inStream = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($src\); $outStream = [System.IO.File]::Create\($tarPath\); $gzip = New-Object System.IO.Compression.GZipStream\($inStream, [System.IO.Compression.CompressionMode]::Decompress\); $gzip.CopyTo\($outStream\); $gzip.Dispose\(\); $outStream.Dispose\(\); $inStream.Dispose\(\); Write-Output \("Decompressed size: " + \(Get-Item $tarPath\).Length\))
